scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @aviary/shared && npm run build --workspace @aviary/db && npm run build --workspace @aviary/api && npm run build --workspace @aviary/worker && npm run build --workspace @aviary/web
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p api/tsconfig.json --noEmit && npm run typecheck --workspace @aviary/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @aviary/db && npm run typecheck --workspace @aviary/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @aviary/worker && npm run typecheck --workspace @aviary/web
